headline: AXIS Capital Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Solid Underwriting Income
summary: AXS beats Q1 estimates as underwriting income climbs and premiums grow, offsetting weaker investment income and higher expenses.

headline: Everest Q1 Earnings Top, Revenues Miss Estimates, Premiums Decline Y/Y
summary: EG's Q1 earnings surge past estimates as reinsurance strength and investment income drive profits, despite lower premiums and a revenue decline.

raw.headline: Everest Q1 Earnings Top, Revenues Miss Estimates, Premiums Decline Y/Y

headline: 5 Dividend Increases Expected In May 2026
summary: Five blue-chip stocks are poised for May 2026 dividend hikes as companies like LOW and NOC prioritize growth despite macro pressures. Learn why yields remain modest.
